Professional, fully insured removal company based in Rochester, Kent. Serving Medway and all of Kent with honest pricing and exceptional care since 2020.

style:
<style>
.loc-hero{background:linear-gradient(180deg,var(--cream),var(--paper));border-bottom:1px solid var(--border);padding:64px 0 52px}
.loc-hero h1{font-size:clamp(30px,4vw,50px);color:var(--navy);letter-spacing:0;max-width:780px;line-height:1.2;margin-bottom:14px}
.loc-hero p{color:var(--muted);font-size:17px;max-width:680px;line-height:1.75}
.loc-hero-actions{display:flex;gap:12px;flex-wrap:wrap;margin-top:28px}
.loc-trust{display:flex;gap:24px;flex-wrap:wrap;margin-top:28px}
.lt-item{display:flex;align-items:center;gap:10px;font-size:13px;color:var(--muted)}
.lt-item strong{color:var(--navy)}
.loc-body{font-size:15px;color:#444;line-height:1.9}
.loc-body h2{font-size:clamp(22px,3vw,30px);color:var(--navy);font-family:var(--ff-display);margin:48px 0 14px;letter-spacing:-0.3px}
.loc-body h3{font-size:19px;color:var(--navy);font-family:var(--ff-display);margin:32px 0 10px}
.loc-body p{margin-bottom:16px}
.loc-body ul{margin:0 0 16px 22px;display:flex;flex-direction:column;gap:8px}
.loc-body ul li{font-size:15px;color:#444;line-height:1.7}
.loc-body strong{color:#111;font-weight:600}
.loc-callout{background:var(--cream);border-left:4px solid var(--accent);border-radius:0 8px 8px 0;padding:20px 24px;margin:28px 0;font-size:15px;color:#444;line-height:1.7}
.loc-layout{display:grid;grid-template-columns:1fr 300px;gap:48px;align-items:start}
@media(max-width:900px){.loc-layout{grid-template-columns:1fr}}
.loc-sidebar{position:sticky;top:100px}
.side-card{background:#fff;border:1px solid var(--border);border-radius:var(--r-lg);padding:24px;margin-bottom:20px}
.side-card h3{font-family:var(--ff-display);font-size:16px;color:var(--navy);margin-bottom:14px}
.side-card ul{list-style:none;display:flex;flex-direction:column;gap:10px}
.side-card ul li a{font-size:14px;color:var(--muted);text-decoration:none;display:flex;gap:8px;line-height:1.5}
.side-card ul li a:hover{color:var(--accent)}
.side-card ul li a::before{content:"→";color:var(--accent);flex-shrink:0}
.loc-faq{margin:0}
.faq-intro{font-size:15px;color:var(--muted);max-width:720px;margin-bottom:36px;line-height:1.75}
.area-pills-loc{display:flex;flex-wrap:wrap;gap:8px;margin:16px 0}
.area-pill-loc{background:var(--cream);border:1px solid var(--border);color:var(--navy);font-size:13px;font-weight:500;padding:6px 14px;border-radius:50px}
.svc-loc-grid{display:grid;grid-template-columns:repeat(3,1fr);gap:20px;margin:24px 0}
@media(max-width:700px){.svc-loc-grid{grid-template-columns:1fr 1fr}}
.svc-loc-card{background:var(--cream);border:1px solid var(--border);border-radius:var(--r-lg);padding:20px;text-align:center}
.svc-loc-card .icon{font-size:28px;margin-bottom:8px}
.svc-loc-card h3{font-size:14px;color:var(--navy);font-family:var(--ff-display);font-weight:700;margin-bottom:6px}
.svc-loc-card p{font-size:12px;color:var(--muted);line-height:1.6}
.review-loc{background:#fff;border:1px solid var(--border);border-radius:var(--r-lg);padding:24px;margin-bottom:20px}
.rv-loc-stars{color:#f59e0b;font-size:16px;margin-bottom:10px}
.rv-loc-text{font-size:14px;color:#444;line-height:1.75;font-style:italic;margin-bottom:14px}
.rv-loc-author{display:flex;align-items:center;gap:12px}
.rv-loc-av{width:36px;height:36px;border-radius:50%;background:var(--navy);color:#fff;display:flex;align-items:center;justify-content:center;font-size:12px;font-weight:700;flex-shrink:0}
.rv-loc-name{font-size:13px;font-weight:600;color:var(--navy)}
.rv-loc-loc{font-size:12px;color:var(--lighter)}

.nav-dropdown{position:relative}
.nav-dropdown-menu{display:none;position:absolute;top:100%;left:0;background:#fff;border:1px solid #e0e0e0;border-radius:8px;box-shadow:0 8px 24px rgba(0,0,0,0.12);min-width:220px;padding:8px 0;z-index:999;list-style:none}
.nav-dropdown.is-open .nav-dropdown-menu{display:block}
.nav-dropdown-menu li a{display:block;padding:8px 16px;font-size:13px;color:#333;text-decoration:none;font-weight:500;transition:background 0.15s}
.nav-dropdown-menu li a:hover{background:#F4F8F6;color:var(--navy)}
.nav-dropdown-toggle{cursor:pointer}
.chevron{width:14px;height:14px;flex-shrink:0}
</style>
